promptsAndResponsesBaseline: Catalog of prompts and response flows with shared filters.
promptsPageBaseline: Catalogue of tracked prompts with filters, cadence, and AI coverage.
responsesPageBaseline: Feed of collected AI responses, filterable by period, competitor, and model.
topCompetitorsDescription: Refine the response view by the competitor you want to track.
promptActionsDescription: Quickly access the most useful actions for this prompt.
runNowDescription: Launches a new run immediately on the selected AI models.
saveBeforeRunDescription: Save this prompt first before running it.
editPromptDescription: Update the text, AI coverage, or cadence.
copyPromptDescription: Copy the prompt text to the clipboard.
openDetailsDescription: Show the full sheet with status and metrics.
viewResponsesDescription: Open the responses tab for this prompt directly.
deletePromptDescription: Permanently remove this prompt from the list.
aiCoverageDescription: Select the models to include in the view.
noResponsesForFilters: No responses for the selected filters.
promptMetricsGlobalDescription: Metrics aggregated across every AI attached to this prompt.
promptMetricsModelDescription: Metrics limited to this AI for this prompt.
cadenceOverrideDescription: A dedicated cadence is active for this AI in the current view.
cadenceInheritedDescription: This cadence is inherited from the main prompt setting.
noActiveAi: No active AI for this prompt.
noPromptsForFilters: No prompt matches the current filters.
archivedPromptsHelp: Archived prompts are removed from monitoring and hidden by default.
editorCreateBaseline: Create the prompt, define AI coverage, and set the analysis cadence from one place.
editorEditBaseline: Update prompt text, AI coverage, and cadence from a dedicated page.
editorPromptDescription: Write the exact query you want to monitor across the selected AI.
editorPromptPlaceholder: Example: What are the best CRM tools for a B2B SaaS SMB?
editorCoverageDescription: Choose the providers and model names that should stay active on this prompt.
editorCadenceDescription: Choose one global rhythm, or enable a custom cadence for specific AI when needed.
editorCadenceModeGlobalDescription: Same cadence for every selected AI
editorCadenceModePerAiDescription: Customize the baseline cadence for specific AI
perAiCustomCadencesDescription: Each AI appears below. Click `Set custom cadence` to change one AI individually.
scheduleHeaderGlobalDescription: One cadence applied across the whole prompt coverage.
scheduleHeaderPerAiDescription_one: {{count}} AI override can diverge from the baseline.
scheduleHeaderPerAiDescription_other: {{count}} AI overrides can diverge from the baseline.
scheduleScopeDescription: Choose one rhythm for the whole prompt, or keep a shared baseline and customize it per AI.
scheduleScopeGlobalDescription: Same cadence for all selected AI
scheduleScopePerAiDescription: Override the baseline for specific AI
scheduleCurrentResultGlobalDescription: This cadence will be used for every AI in the prompt coverage.
scheduleCurrentResultPerAiDescription_on: {{count}} AI override can diverge from the baseline.
scheduleCurrentResultPerAiDescription_ot: {{count}} AI overrides can diverge from the baseline.
scheduleQuickPresetsDescription: Pick a readable rhythm first. Use the advanced section only if you need a custom cron rule.
scheduleMainCadenceDescription: Used as the main cadence for the full prompt coverage.
scheduleSharedFallbackDescription: Used as the shared fallback before any per-AI override.
advancedCustomRuleDescription: Only open this if presets are not enough.
scheduleGlobalModeDescription: Every AI attached to this prompt follows the same analysis cadence.
schedulePerAiOverridesDescription: Keep a global baseline, then accelerate or slow down specific AI models.
overrideCronHelp: Use 5 cron fields for the override.
createPromptDialogDescription: Create a prompt with an optional persona and choose exactly which AI models should appear on it.
createPromptDialogPromptPlaceholder: E.g. Best CRM startups for B2B SaaS?
deletePromptDescription: This prompt will be permanently deleted.
deletePromptsDescription: These prompts will be permanently deleted.
insufficientCreditsQuotaDescription: This analysis costs {{credits}} credits. {{remaining}}/{{total}} credits remain in your monthly quota.
updatePromptCoverageError: Unable to update the prompt AI coverage.
updatePromptScheduleError: Unable to update the prompt analysis cadence.
missingCreatedPromptError: The backend did not return the created prompt.
runPromptInsufficientCreditsError: Insufficient credits to run this analysis.
